Do not paste secrets, raw session logs, customer data, tokens, private paths, or exploit details into a public issue.

Use [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for private disclosure. If you can safely share a public summary, include:

## Safe summary

## Affected surface

## Impact
